news.headline: US soldier allegedly bet on Maduro operation using intel
news.summary:
<p>A US soldier faces charges for using classified information to bet on online prediction markets related to the US operation to capture former Venezuelan president Nicolas Maduro, the Department of Justice said Thursday.</p>
